scope: Integrated TorchTitan AllToAllTokenDispatcher + GroupedExperts execute-mode hot-row split.
evidence: The matching forward-only execute-mode probe passed with exact output parity on 4 CPU/Gloo ranks.
The matching full backward probe with balanced_mode=off passed on 4 CPU/Gloo ranks.
The full backward execute-mode probe printed differentiable all_reduce warnings and was terminated by the 45-second timeout.
read: The source-local hot-row split is forward-correct, and the standard EP backward harness is valid. The remaining issue is the integrated execute-mode hot-weight gradient path: differentiable hot-weight all_reduce is not yet safe when composed with the standard EP autograd all_to_all ordering.
next_action: Replace the differentiable hot-weight all_reduce path with an explicit hot-weight broadcast plus explicit hot-grad reduce, or a custom autograd function that controls collective participation and ordering before attempting e2e TFLOPs materialization.
